closureCriteria.criterion: migration creates or plans supply, semantic-volume, measuremint, range, cell, mint receipt, ownership, read-license, allocation, ancestry, licensed-read revenue, fee, anchor, order, transfer, journal, reconciliation, upgrade, and telemetry tables
evidence: supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql creates the V27 registry/projection table family
packages/orm/src/__tests__/btd-registry.test.ts asserts the required table set exists

closureCriteria.criterion: SQL constraints cover cap, uniqueness, no overlap, access policy, and service-role mutation
evidence: btd_supply_state enforces max_supply = 21000000, cap, singleton, contiguous next_token_id, curve, and tail policy
btd_asset_pack_ranges enforces unique asset_pack_id, range conservation, cap, access policy, and GiST no-overlap exclusion
btd_cells enforces unique token_id and token id cap
access-policy checks exist on range, cell, ownership, license, anchor, order, and rights-transfer rows
V27 registry tables enable row-level security and define no user-facing mutation policies, keeping writes behind service-role route/worker boundaries
packages/orm/src/models/btd-registry.ts exposes BtdRegistryModel over Bitcode-native BTD registry table names
packages/orm/src/client.ts exposes btdRegistry on standard and admin clients
packages/orm/src/__tests__/btd-registry.test.ts verifies model reads and writes target BTD registry tables

closureCriteria.criterion: user_credits is no longer canonical tokenomics truth
evidence: packages/orm/src/models/user-btd-balances.ts documents user_credits as a non-canonical compatibility read corridor only
packages/orm/src/models/user-btd-transactions.ts documents user_credit_usages as a non-canonical compatibility read corridor only
internal-docs/BITCODE_EXCHANGE_DATABASE.md states compatibility tables cannot mint BTD or settle AssetPack rights

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports an existing ts-jest globals deprecation warning.

nonPromotionAssertions: Gate 6 closure does not claim live Supabase migration execution, generated DB type refresh, persisted wallet/ledger finality, or V27 promotion
No value-bearing mainnet readiness or launch is claimed by Gate 6 closure
remainingGateFamilies: Gate 10: Wallet And BTC Fee Settlement
Gate 13: Terminal Transactions And Journal Diffing
Gate 16: Product Surfaces, Research Rebinding, And Promotion Proof
